title: Development of innovative tools to optimise coordinated manure management and soil fertilisation from an economic and environmental point of view, within a joint and coordinated management framework, representative of the entire Catalan farming sector
description: A project aimed at developing innovative tools to optimise coordinated manure management and enhance soil fertilisation within Catalan farming cooperatives. It seeks to improve nutrient planning, slurry analysis, application efficiency, and traceability while reducing administrative burden for management centres.
